programme.title: O Retorno do Dragão - A Cidade Perdida, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Segundo uma lenda milenar chinesa, a cada 60 anos uma forte tempestade de areia revelará o local onde um tesouro sagrado que estava perdido está localizado, a região de Dragon Gate.

programme.title: Thor: Deus do Trovão, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: O inescrupuloso Loki escapou de Asgard e está à procura de Yggdrasil, a árvore que contém toda a força do universo. Ele planeja destruí-la e replantá-la à sua imagem e semelhança.

programme.title: Pequenos Espiões 4, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Marisa Cortez Wilson é casada com Wilbur, um repórter conhecido por desmascarar espiões, e com ele tem um bebê e duas crianças. O que o marido não sabe é que a esposa é uma ex-espiã, que decidiu largar a carreira para se dedicar à família.

programme.title: Arthur & Merlin: Cavaleiros de Camelot, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Um Rei Arthur muito mais velho retorna para casa após lutar contra o Império Romano. Seu filho ilegítimo corrompeu o trono de Camelot. Agora o Rei Arthur deve se reunir com o mago Merlin e os Cavaleiros da Távola Redonda e lutar para recuperar sua coroa.

programme.title: O Enigma da Pirâmide, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: Quando uma série de assassinatos bizarros e enigmáticos assolam Londres, o jovem Holmes e seu novo amigo Watson se encontram involuntariamente envolvidos no sombrio mistério.

programme.title: Em Busca do Castelo Dourado, (2019, Action)
programme.desc: Quando o rei e a rainha são envenenados, os irmãos Per e Pal são presos suspeitos do crime. O caçula da família, Espen Ash Lad e a princesa Kristin embarcam em uma perigosa jornada em busca do lendário castelo Soria Moria e da fonte da Água da Vida

programme.title: As Tartarugas Ninja 3, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Um cetro mágico leva April para o Japão antigo. As Tartarugas Ninja viajam no tempo para salvá-la, mas Michelangelo se perde. Donatello, Raphael e Leonardo ajudam uma vila contra o malvado Lorde Norinaga.

programme.title: Motoqueiro Fantasma: Espírito de Vingança, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Nove anos após se transformar no temido Motoqueiro Fantasma, Johnny Blaze se refugia para tentar controlar sua maldição e deixá-la escondida da maioria das pessoas. Ele leva uma vida solitária, até ser obrigado a entrar em ação novamente.

programme.title: A Viagem, (2012, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Uma exploração de como as ações de vidas individuais impactam umas às outras no passado, presente e futuro, como uma alma vai de assassino a herói, e um ato de bondade se espalha ao longo dos séculos para inspirar uma revolução.

programme.title: Era uma vez na China e na América, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: Jet Li é Wong Fei-Hong, herói chinês que vai à América, é salvo por índios e luta contra a exploração de trabalhadores chineses por um tirano local.

programme.title: Aliança Mortal, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um grande carregamento de drogas desaparece entre a fronteira Canadá-Estados Unidos. Os traficantes de drogas que o procuram obrigam um guarda florestal, um ex-membro das Forças Especiais, a ajudá-los a encontrar a droga.

programme.title: O Monge à Prova de Balas, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Baseado em uma história em quadrinhos "underground", ele conta a história de um monge tibetano imortal -Chow- que se torna o mentor de um jovem menino de rua -Scott-, a quem ele ensina a proteger um velho pergaminho que o monge cuidou durante anos.

programme.title: Dragões para Sempre, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie é contratado para defender uma empresa acusada de poluir as águas da cidade. Ao descobrir que eles produzem drogas, Jackie decide mudar de lado.​

programme.title: Era uma vez na China 3, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: Mestre Wong e seus discípulos entram na 'Competição de Leão Dançante' para deter um plano de assassinato e enfrentar um oponente arrogante.

programme.title: Fora do Rumo, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: Um detetive de Hong Kong se une a um jogador americano para lutar contra um notório criminoso chinês.

programme.title: Ip Man - O Mestre do Kug Fu, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Durante o tempo em que foi capitão da polícia na cidade de Foshan, Ip Man é perseguido por um gângster vingativo, enquanto o exército japonês invade a região.

programme.title: Cão de briga, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: Criado por um mafioso (Hoskins) como um animal para ser uma máquina de matar, (Jet Li) é campeão de lutas clandestinas que ajuda pianista cego (Freeman) perseguido por criminosos.

programme.title: Retroceder Nunca, Render-se Jamais, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Jason Stillwell é um fã de Bruce Lee e jovem aprendiz de artes marciais. Após seu pai negar participar de uma gangue de criminosos, eles se mudam de cidade, onde Jason encontrará problemas.

programme.title: The Greatest Show On Earth, (1952, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Charlton Heston stars as Brad Braden, the circus manager who lives and breathes to keep the show rolling. With the Big Top about to hit rock bottom, Braden hires The Great Sebastian, a daring trapeze legend, to revitalize the circus.

programme.title: War and Peace, (1956, Romance)
programme.desc: The personal stories of many characters, love affairs and philosophies are woven throughout this massive and intricate tapestry of Russia during Napoleon's invasion at the turn of the 19th century.

programme.title: Thunder Road, (1958, Action)
programme.desc: Lucas Doolin (Robert Mitchum) runs moonshine across the mountain back roads, dodging the law and the lawless alike. With government agents closing in on him, it seems the county may run dry--but Doolin slams the pedal to the metal for one last run.

programme.title: Odd Man Out, (1947, Drama)
programme.desc: A wounded Irish nationalist leader attempts to evade police following a failed robbery in Belfast.

programme.title: Teacher's Pet, (1958, Romance)
programme.desc: Clark Gable plays Jim Gannon, a school-of-hard-knocks newspaperman who despises journalism schools, until he sees who's doing the teaching.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink, (1962, Comedy)
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: The Miracle Of Morgan's Creek, (1944, Comedy)
programme.desc: After marrying a soldier during a wild night on the town, a small-town girl suffers amnesia and can't remember anything about the man she married.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot, (1959, Comedy)
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: London Has Fallen, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

programme.title: Windtalkers, (2002, War Drama)
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Gladiator, (2000, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Road House, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze stars with Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and Ben Gazzara in this classic, action-filled tale of a cool but tough bouncer -- with a degree in philosophy -- at a Midwestern roadhouse who goes head to head with an insidious mob boss.

programme.title: The Mechanic, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: In this action-packed thriller, Jason Statham is a mechanic—an elite assassin with a strict code and unique talent for cleanly eliminating targets. Simon West (CON AIR) directs this hit remake of the 1972 Charles Bronson movie.

programme.title: Killer Elite, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: Gladiator, (2000, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Jack Reacher, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody, who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!"

programme.title: The Covenant, (2006, Thriller)
programme.desc: To the students of the Spenser Academy, the Sons of Ipswich are the baddest boys on campus. But that's not all they share. The four friends also share a 300-year-old secret: they're warlocks, the teenage descendants of a 17th-century coven of witches.

programme.title: The Exorcism of Emily Rose, (2005, Horror)
programme.desc: A thrilling horror film about a lawyer (Linney), who takes on a negligent homicide case involving a priest (Wilkinson) who performed an exorcism on a young girl.

programme.title: Quarantine, (2008, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: When a news crew decides to trail a brave fire-fighting team, they never suspect that the first call for help they respond to that night may be their last. Now they're trapped in an apartment complex sealed off by the government. Rating: R

programme.title: Quarantine 2: Terminal, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Earlier tonight, a bizarre disease was unleashed in a run-down Los Angeles tenement... and no one got out alive. Yet something escaped. Now, aboard Flight 318, the first symptoms begin to show. Rating: R

programme.title: 30 Days of Night, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days, (2010, Horror)
programme.desc: Almost a year has passed since Barrow, Alaska’s population was decimated by vampires. Stella, mourning her husband’s murder, has been travelling the world trying to convince others that vampires exist.

programme.title: Evil Dead, (2013, Horror)
programme.desc: Five friends have found the mysterious and fiercely powerful Book of the Dead, which releases a violent demon on a bloodthirsty quest to possess them all.

programme.title: Cobweb, (2023, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Peter confides in his parents (Lizzy Caplan, Antony Starr) about mysterious tapping in his bedroom wall, but they say it’s just an old house. As his fear grows, so do his doubts.

programme.title: The Craft: Legacy, (2020, Thriller)
programme.desc: In Blumhouse's continuation of the cult hit The Craft, an eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dio the Invader
programme.desc: On a stormy night in Victorian England, a coach carrying an aristocratic family meets with disaster, forever changing the fate of its sole survivors, George and Jonathan Joestar.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Letter From the Past
programme.desc: Hostility grows between Jonathan and his adopted brother, Dio, as forgotten secrets emerge. Do the sinister slums of London hold the secret to the mask and Jonathan’s suspicions?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jonathan and his new comrade, Speedwagon, confront Dio but are caught off guard when a savage reversal sends shock waves through the Joestar family.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Overdrive
programme.desc: Fate arranges the meeting of a broken Jonathan and the mysterious Zeppeli, master of Hamon energy. Meanwhile, one particularly savage vampire recruit hopes to slice his way to victory.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Dark Knights
programme.desc: Terror follows Jonathan and his fellow travelers to Windknight’s Lot, where they find themselves faced with the devious Dio. The onslaught of evil continues with two colossal knights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tomorrow's Courage
programme.desc: Just as Jonathan’s heroism transforms one foe’s hatred into humanity, an even greater behemoth drives the crew to a knightly training camp, complete with a medieval chamber of death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Sorrowful Successor
programme.desc: Conquering his own fear, an unlikely star opens an opportunity for Zeppeli and Jonathan. But as a prophecy from Zeppeli’s past unfolds dramatically in a clash of life, death, and succession, a true hero triumphs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bloody Battle! JoJo & Dio

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Final Ripple!
programme.desc: Jonathan takes Erina’s hand in marriage before embarking on a celebratory journey to America. But two stowaways unwittingly change the course of history for all those onboard.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: New York's JoJo

programme.title: Harlem Nights, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk, (2003, Action)

programme.title: Galaxy Quest, (1999, Science fiction)

programme.title: Heartburn, (1986, Comedy)

programme.title: Idle Hands, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: The devil will find work for idle hands to do, but what happens when he chooses the laziest teen slacker in the world to do his dirty work? Anton Tobias is a couch potato burn-out who can't control the murderous impulses of his possessed hand. Rated: R

programme.title: Return to Me, (2000, Comedy)
programme.desc: A man who falls in love with the woman who received his wife's heart must decide which woman it is who holds his heart.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias, (1989, Dramedy)

programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Bad Ass, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana, in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: Super, (2011, Comedy)
programme.desc: Rainn Wilson, Elliot Page, Liv Tyler, and Kevin Bacon bring to life this super-entertaining action fantasy about a regular joe turned homegrown masked avenger.

programme.title: Knights of Badassdom, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Live-action role players conjure up a demon from Hell by mistake and they must deal with the consequences.

programme.title: The Craft: Legacy, (2020, Thriller)
programme.desc: In Blumhouse's continuation of the cult hit The Craft, an eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

programme.title: Child's Play, (1988, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: When serial killer Charles Lee Ray is mortally wounded in a police shoot-out, he uses a voodoo spell to transfer his soul into Chucky, a Good Guys doll. Young Andy receives the doll as a birthday gift, and Chucky soon resumes his killing spree.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, (1980, Horror)
programme.desc: Camp Crystal Lake has been shuttered for over 20 years due to several vicious and unsolved murders. The camp's new owner and seven young counselors are readying the property for re-opening despite warnings of a "death curse" by local residents.

programme.title: The Blob, (1988, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: THE BLOB has returned in this horrific tale about a vile, malignant life-form that crashes to earth in a cozy, rural American town called Arborville. Untroubled by conscience or intellect, the Blob does only one thing-and does it well. Rated: R

programme.title: April Fool's Day, (1986, Horror)
programme.desc: When Muffy St. John invited her college friends up to her parents’ secluded island home for the time of their lives, she just forgot to tell them it might be the last time of their lives.

programme.title: Cujo, (1983, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Pet Sematary, (1989, Horror)
programme.desc: For most families, moving is a new beginning. But for the Creeds, it could be the beginning of the end. Because they've just moved in next door to a place that children built with broken dreams, the Pet Sematary.

programme.title: Pet Sematary Two, (1992, Horror)
programme.desc: Antagonized by the neighbourhood kids, Jeff befriends outsider, Drew Gilbert, who lives in fear of his cruel stepfather Gus. After Gus shoots Drew's beloved dog, the boys bury the body in a place rumoured to have powers of resurrection.

programme.title: Carrie, (2013, Horror)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark, (2010, Horror)
programme.desc: Sally moves to Rhode Island to live with her father and his new girlfriend in their 19th-century mansion. While exploring the house, Sally starts to hear voices coming from creatures in the basement whose hidden agenda is to claim her as one of their own.

programme.title: The Woman in Black, (2012, Horror)
programme.desc: Author Kipps (Daniel Radcliffe), a widowed lawyer, is sent to a remote village to sort out the affairs of a recently deceased eccentric. But upon his arrival, it soon becomes clear that everyone in the own is keeping a deadly secret.

programme.title: The Exorcism of Emily Rose, (2005, Horror)
programme.desc: A thrilling horror film about a lawyer (Linney), who takes on a negligent homicide case involving a priest (Wilkinson) who performed an exorcism on a young girl.

programme.title: Things Are Tough All Over, (1982, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong are at it again! Tommy Chong plays the maniacal Prince Habib, as well as the famous spaced-out wanderer. Richard "Cheech" Marin is Habib's wily brother, Mr. Slyman, in addition to his usual role. Rated: R

programme.title: They Call Me Bruce?, (1982, Comedy)
programme.desc: A goofy Korean finds his life hopelessly complicated when people continually confusing him with Bruce Lee while he unknowingly transports cocaine across the country.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Still Smokin, (1983, Comedy)
programme.desc: It's Cheech and Chong at their wildest, craziest, most medicated, doing all those zonked-out characters and hilarious routines that put them where they are today: out of the country.

programme.title: Things Are Tough All Over, (1982, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong are at it again! Tommy Chong plays the maniacal Prince Habib, as well as the famous spaced-out wanderer. Richard "Cheech" Marin is Habib's wily brother, Mr. Slyman, in addition to his usual role. Rated: R

programme.title: Hollywood Shuffle, (1987, Independent Drama)

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Still Smokin, (1983, Comedy)
programme.desc: It's Cheech and Chong at their wildest, craziest, most medicated, doing all those zonked-out characters and hilarious routines that put them where they are today: out of the country.

programme.title: Teen Witch, (1989, Comedy)

programme.title: Big Top Pee-Wee, (1987, Comedy)
programme.desc: In Big Top Pee-Wee, I live on a country farm where I feed my barnyard animals pancake breakfasts and work on top-secret botanical experiments with my pet pig, Vance.

programme.title: Major League, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians threatens to move the team unless they deliver immediate results. She then fills the roster with has-beens to guarantee their failure. But the team miraculously rallies together and starts to win.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off, (1986, Comedy)
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Noah, (2014, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Beastly, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Vanessa Hudgens stars in this modern day take on a classic fable, in which a shallow high school student is hideously transformed by a classmate, left to find someone who can see past the surface and love him, or remain "beastly" forever.

programme.title: Dreamgirls, (2006, Musical)
programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Aeon Flux, (2005, Thriller)

programme.title: The Island, (2005, Action)

programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer, (1997, Horror)
programme.desc: After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. But exactly one year later, the dead man returns from his watery grave, and he's looking for more than an apology.

programme.desc: Remember Ben Willis? He's the fisherman who killed the boy who was driving the car when it went off the road in the fatal accident that killed his daughter, Sara... he's the man in the slicker with a hook in his hand... well, he's back.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot, (1974, Action)

programme.title: King Kong, (1976, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A petroleum exploration expedition comes to an isolated island and encounters a colossal giant gorilla.

programme.sub-title: A Brawl in Small Town Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi finds Grandpa's kidnapper, but is it really a kidnapping? While Yugi unravels the truth, Rebecca starts to unravel when her dragons fall prey to Leon's fervent fables. Rebecca must think of a new plan quickly or there will be no happy ending.
programme.sub-title: A Brawl in Small Town Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Zigfried vs. Leon for the right to challenge Yugi in the KC Grand Championship Finals... but Kaiba stops the duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a battle between Zigfried and Kaiba. Zigfried quickly gains the advantage by destroying Kaiba's monsters before he can even draw them!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Yugi vs. Leon for the title of King of Games at the KC Grand Championship! Something sinister lurks in the shadows, for this duel is more than just getting the crown. Zigfried's greatest revenge will commence as his real plan is unleashed.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Leon is Zigfried's younger brother, and he'll avenge his family's loss. Leon's fairy tales are giving Yugi nightmares but the worst is yet to come as Leon has Zigfried's mysterious and special card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Golden Castle of Stromberg is infecting the world's Duel Disks with a virus that will destroy KaibaCorp. If Yugi doesn't destroy the card, the virus program can't be stopped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang goes on an exotic trip to India, but when their plane crashes in a deserted forest, their vacation turns into a dangerous game of survival.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Realizing that they've become part of a real-life version of the Capsule Monsters board game, the gang struggles to find a way out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Reunited at last, Yugi and his friends rejoice. But their celebration is soon interrupted by a pack of man-eating wolves, a giant turtle, and an angry Genie!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa translates an ancient stone tablet which directs the gang to locate the "Fortress of Fear." Now they have until sunset to find this mysterious structure or they'll be trapped in the world of Capsule Monsters forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends discover that in order to return home to the real world they must pass a series of tests: the Five Sacred Trials. The first of which pits them against enormous sand worms and a mysterious voice that travels with the desert wind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping their battle in the desert, the gang finds themselves stranded on a mysterious floating island, where they face a monster that derives its strength from the sun.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland. To make matters worse, Joey is possessed by an evil force, and destroying it may mean destroying Joey as well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends are faced with an impossible task: locating a magical apple in a forest full of apple trees.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang stumbles upon a small kingdom dominated by a clan of fierce dragons known as The Fiendish Five. If they fail to slay these beasts, one of Yugi's friends must give up his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends defeat the Fiendish Five…or so they think. These ferocious dragons have merged together and are now more powerful than ever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain, Luffy! But the arrival of Germa has complicated matters. Whose side do these powerful superhumans fight on? In the end, sisterly love will see Sanji saved!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Pulling Back from the Brink! The Formidable Reinforcements – Germa!

programme.title: Luffy and Sanji are safe! But the critical moment approaches - the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! Will it be sweet release or bitter defeat? Meanwhile, a cunning pincer attack leaves the Straw Hats hopelessly trapped.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Last Hope! The Sun Pirates Emerge!

programme.title: With the help of the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape! And the Sun Pirates bid farewell to their former captain. Mama finally tastes the Wedding Cake and the results are positively scrumptious!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Captivating Flavor! Sanji's Cake of Happiness!

programme.title: The Big Mom Pirates fooled! The Straw Hats have eluded their would-be tormentors with the help of the Sun Pirates! However, as the fleet of the Big Mom Pirates is still coming after them, Jimbei makes a crucial decision to help the Sunny to get away.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Man of Humanity and Justice! Jimbei, a Desperate Massive Ocean Current!

programme.title: At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies and friends, and would-be lovers. As the sea opens before them, what price has been paid for their escape?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Parting Time! Pudding's Last Wish!

programme.title: Luffy's recent exploits make their way around the world! The reputation of this mighty pirate begins to grow as all eyes look towards the Straw Hats' next move! Also - German 66 leaves an artifact behind which excites the crew!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The World is Stunned! The Fifth Emperor of the Sea Emerges!

programme.title: As the royals make their way to the Reverie, the mighty Navy takes all precautions to make sure they don't fall prey to kidnappings! At the vanguard is Koby, who glimpses Luffy's exploits and remembers their shared past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To the Reverie! The Straw Hats' Sworn Allies Come Together!

programme.title: A vicious pirate group led by Pinkbeard who describes himself as one of Blackbeard's affiliates attacks a town in the Kingdom of Lulucia while their king and able-bodied soldiers have gone to the Reverie. And four bizarre individuals come to help.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sabo Goes into Action! All the Captains of the Revolutionary Army Appear!

programme.title: At New Marineford, Sakazuki, the new Admiral of the Fleet, hears the news about Luffy and recalls the tumultuous Paramount War that haunts the Navy! That game-changing war has repercussions that last into the present!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Going into Action! The Implacable New Admiral of the Fleet - Sakazuki!

programme.title: Nobles from around the world gather for the Reverie as the echoes of the Paramount War resound! Among them are Shirahoshi and her family from the Ryugu Kingdom under the sea. Meanwhile, Admiral Fujitora has a conversation with his new colleague.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Paramount War! The Inherited Will of the King of the Pirates!

programme.title: Stelly, Sabo's adopted brother and now the king of the Goa Kingdom, walks up to Garp who is escorting the royal family of the Fish-Man Island, with an air of importance and something up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: One Step Forward for Her Dream! Shirahoshi Goes Out in the Sun!

programme.title: Shirahoshi and her family finally reach the Holyland of Mariejois! But all the unexpected attention confuses her. Meanwhile, Vivi from Alabasta meets Leo and Rebecca from Dressrosa, and tells them the story of her journey with the Straw Hats.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Miss Him! Vivi and Rebecca's Sentiments!

programme.title: Vivi reunites with Dalton and Dr. Kureha from the Sakura Kingdom and they share their memories of the Straw Hats with Shirahoshi and Rebecca. Meanwhile, a shadowy figure descends a long staircase at the castle in the Holyland and opens a mysterious door.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: In the Dark Recesses of the Holyland! A Mysterious Giant Straw Hat!

programme.title: Shirahoshi crosses the fancy of a Celestial Dragon, and those living gods are not open to having their whims disobeyed! As she is dragged away, King Neptune comes to her rescue, risking life and limb by defying the Celestial Dragon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Holyland in Tumult! The Targeted Princess Shirahoshi!

programme.title: The Emperors of the Sea, Big Mom and Kaido decide to team up against Luffy! Meanwhile, Garp hears about the wild exploits of his grandson, all while a mysterious outsider visits the highest authority in the world!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Explosive Situation! Two Emperors of the Sea Going After Luffy!

programme.title: After sneaking into the Land of the Gods, Sabo sees the shocking figure of his friend – Kuma! Abused by the World Government as a pawn in their games, Kuma, who was made an example of what happens when you disobey the gods!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sabo Enraged! The Tragedy of the Revolutionary Army Officer Kuma!

programme.title: The Reverie has begun! The representative kings and queens first discuss what to do with Straw Hat Luffy. Meanwhile the Revolutionary Army confirms its desire to save Kuma! All while they recount how the Straw Hats have grown!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally, It Starts! The Conspiracy-filled Reverie!

programme.title: In order to recruit a strong ally towards bringing down Kaido, Cat Viper and his crew stop by Whitebeard's homeland to see Marco, the 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Marco! The Keeper of Whitebeard's Last Memento!

programme.title: Luffy and the others become excited as they see familiar faces in a newspaper article about the Reverie while they close in on the Land of Wano. But this dangerous and foreboding land is as inaccessible as it is mysterious! The sea itself is a barrier!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Climbing Up a Waterfall! A Great Journey Through the Land of Wano's Sea Zone!

programme.title: A mysterious country, a rampaging slasher, ancient samurai rituals of seppuku - and Zoro in the crosshairs! When a street assault occurs, all signs point to Zoro! Meanwhile, Luffy finally arrives at the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Land of Wano! To the Samurai Country where Cherry Blossoms Flutter!

programme.title: Stranded alone on the beach, Luffy tries to gather his bearings only to be confronted by some mysterious, and dangerous, local fauna! And then, he meets a little girl named Otama! Meanwhile, Zoro makes trouble for the others who are trying to blend in!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Otama Appears! Luffy vs. Kaido's Army!

programme.title: Otama's gratitude towards Luffy knows no bounds! But the feast she cooks him exhausts her food stores completely! As she suffers from poor drinking water, her companion tells the story of the mysterious outsider she waits for - Ace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: He'll Come! The Legend of Ace in the Land of Wano!

programme.title: Ambushed and outgunned by a skilled bounty hunter Cidre's group, the Straw Hats rely on the Sunny's Coup de Burst to escape! But they end up stranded without cola! A nearby soda island offers a solution.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Side Story! The World's Greatest Bounty Hunter, Cidre!

programme.title: Luffy and Boa Hancock square off against the Cidre Guild! These unscrupulous bounty hunters have one thing in mind - profit at any cost! When the battle looks won, Cidre gears up in a menacing power suit!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Side Story! Clash! Luffy vs. the King of Carbonation!

programme.title: Otama recounts her promise to Ace while Luffy rushes her to medical attention. But just as they reach the wasteland, a familiar face comes into view! But Kaido's underlings show up too!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save Otama! Straw Hat, Bounding through the Wasteland!

programme.title: Otama's temperature is going up and Luffy has no time to waste! However, Hawkins, one of Kaido's Headliners, blocks their way by showing his unique powers and skills which can harm his own men.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Headliner! Hawkins the Magician Appears!

programme.title: Luffy and Zoro have been stalled by Hawkins but their fortune looks bright as they are guided by a woman who Zoro had saved. She leads them to a teahouse and to an herbal remedy for the river poison.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Defeat is Inevitable! The Strawman's Fierce Attack!

programme.title: Otama's life is saved by Otsuru at her teahouse. The proud Otama finds it hard to take more kindness. The group learns of the Okobore Town - living on the cast-offs of the officials! Then, suddenly, they were attacked by the Shogun's men!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Day of My Life! Otama and Her Sweet Red-bean Soup!

programme.title: Otama has been kidnapped by the Gifters! She is taken to a flourishing town called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking Headliner was expecting her. Luffy and Zoro rush to rescue her along with a samurai, Okiku!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Charging into the Enemy's Territory! Bakura Town - Where Officials Thrive!

programme.title: As Luffy, Zoro, and Okiku bounce through Bakura Town on Komachiyo's back, a sumo wrestler comes flying towards them! Interested, they go down to watch sumo but the undefeated yokozuna Urashima has been expecting Okiku there.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Yokozuna Appears! The Invincible Urashima Goes After Okiku!

programme.title: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in the Land of Wano, to a sumo match! Urashima even uses illegal moves to beat Luffy at any cost! Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he knows she committed a crime and he has to punish her for it.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Climactic Sumo Battle! Straw Hat vs. the Strongest Ever Yokozuna!

programme.title: After sending the yokozuna Urashima flying, Luffy and his clan continue their search for Bakura Town's boss to save Otama! They finally find the boss, Holdem, one of the Beast Pirates' Headliners.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Rages! Rescue Otama from Danger!

programme.title: Facing Holdem who is holding Otama as hostage, Luffy prepares for a fight but Okiku tries to stop him by sharing who is really ruling the region. Meanwhile, Basil Hawkins is confronted by a mysterious figure.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Taking Back Otama! A Fierce Fight Against Holdem!

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Robocop, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: In 2028 Detroit, when Alex Murphy (Joel Kinnaman) -- a loving husband, father and good cop -- is critically injured in the line of duty, the multinational conglomerate OmniCorp sees their chance for a part-man, part-robot police officer.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Ultraviolet, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich, Cameron Bright Nick Chinlund and William Fichtner star in this theatrical set in the late 21st century, where some humans have been modified genetically by a vampire-like disease and the world is pushed to the brink of worldwide civil war.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: High Life, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Monte (Robert Pattinson) and his baby daughter are the last survivors of a damned and dangerous mission to the outer reaches of the solar system. They rely on each other to survive as they hurtle toward the oblivion of a black hole.

programme.title: Robin Hood Of Texas, (1947, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and the Cass County Boys are unjustly arrested as bank bandits. Released by police as decoys to locate the loot, Gene and the boys find themselves in trouble with the real bank robbers.

programme.title: The Last Round-Up, (1947, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry is a cattle rancher determined to protect the interests of neighboring ranchers and Indians against unscrupulous land manipulators when local authorities plan to build an aqueduct.

programme.title: Hondo, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: The Wonderful Country, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: In this action-packed western, ex-pat Martin Brady (Robert Mitchum) travels to Texas to broker an arms deal for Mexican Governor Castro (Pedro Armendariz). But things get complicated when the the guns he was returning to Mexico are stolen.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Hondo, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: Legally Blonde, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: Elle Woods has it all, but when her boyfriend goes to Harvard, Ellie rallies all her resources to get into Harvard Law. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of home. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for herself and for all blondes!

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: She's The Man, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: The laughs are non-stop when Viola, disguised as her twin brother, Sebastian, joins the high school boy's soccer team and helps win the big game while unexpectedly falling for Duke, the hot star forward.

programme.title: School of Rock, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Jack Black stars as a guitarist with delusions of grandeur. Kicked out of his band and looking for work, he becomes a substitute teacher and turns his class into rock and rollers.

programme.title: Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.

programme.title: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A new group of survivors seems to have it all in their impressive community; however, there is a price.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The remaining members of the group try to keep it together in Alexandria; they receive a sobering visit.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Saddled with grief and surrounded by enemies, members of the group try to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Someone stumbles upon a brand-new society unlike anything seen before.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Three Outer Guardians risk their lives to contain Master Pharaoh 90 within the Sankakusu Delta and halt his attempt to become one with the Earth.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: As Master Pharaoh 90’s power continues to grow, to protect her friends Super Sailor Moon decides to make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: With Super Sailor Moon gone, the remaining Sailor Guardians must helplessly watch as Sailor Saturn brings an end to the world with her Silence Glaive.

programme.title: Sailor Moon R: The Movie
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians unite to save Earth from an alien force!

programme.title: Sailor Moon S: The Movie
programme.desc: Princess Snow Kaguya has a chilling plan to freeze Earth. Sailor Moon and her team are now the only hope!

programme.title: Sailor Moon Super S: The Movie
programme.desc: The evil Queen plots to trap Earth in a energy field, powered by the dreams of children. Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians must now save the world!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is a schoolgirl who meets a talking cat named Luna. Usagi is transformed into Sailor Moon, the guardian who fights for love and justice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A house of fortune opens up and gains popularity for its predictions. The customers begin to act violent. Usagi and Luna decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Punishment Awaits: The House Of Fortune Is The Monster Mansion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls in town are tuning in to a radio program that reads out love letters. A sleeping sickness is plaguing the town that puts people to sleep.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Sleeping Sickness: Protect the Girls In Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is shocked to find out that she’s gained weight from too much eating. Determined to get back into shape, Usagi and her friends join a gym.
programme.sub-title: Learn How to Be Skinny from Usagi

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo brings home a pet Chanela. Shingo becomes so absorbed in the Chanela that he stops going to school, which worries Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Scent of a Monster: Chanela Will Steal Your Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi bumps into Yusuke Amade, a famous musician who claims he is being chased by a monster. Usagi and Luna decide to keep an eye on Yusuke.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Melody of Love: Usagi Plays Cupid

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru dream of becoming famous like Mikan Shiratori. When the girls hear that Mikan is hosting a talent contest, they see their chance.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Learns Her Lesson: Becoming a Star Is Hard Work

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi befriends Ami Mizuno, the school’s smartest girl. But Luna, who senses an unknown energy coming from Ami, suspects her of being a Monster.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Genius Is a Monster: The Brainwashing Cram School of Horror

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Ami find a clock that resembles Luna. That night, the clock emits a strange light that causes Usagi to become very impatient.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Disaster: Beware of the Clock of Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: People who take the bus near the Hikawa Shrine have started to go missing. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Bus: Enter Mars, the Guardian of Fire

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians go to the amusement park where visitors have gone missing. But Usagi is more focused on playing than finding the missing people.
programme.sub-title: Usagi vs. Rei: Nightmare in Dream Land

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei goes off on a luxury cruise with Ami after winning tickets through the local lottery. Feeling left behind, Usagi sneaks aboard the ship.
programme.sub-title: I Want a Boyfriend: The Luxury Cruise Ship is a Trap

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Jadeite is given a warning by Queen Beryl, who can no longer tolerate the general’s failures. Jadeite challenges the Sailor Guardians to a showdown.
programme.sub-title: Girls Unite: The End of Jadeite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rui is a talented tennis player but Naru has noticed a dark change in her. Worried about their classmate, Naru and Usagi go to investigate.
programme.sub-title: A New Enemy Appears: Nephrite's Evil Crest

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.
programme.sub-title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Children's Dreams: Friendship Through Anime

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Now You See Me, (1970, Entertainment)

programme.title: Sem Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um grupo de três amigos planeja um grande roubo que acaba dando errado quando um deles se revela um traidor. Enganado, Sonny decide assumir o problema de frente e busca vingança contra o antigo parceiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Bruce, Phillippe, Ryan, Willis Diretor: Mike Gunther

programme.title: Céu em Chamas, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. Midori, uma relutante noiva japonesa, forja seu sequestro durante a lua-de-mel em Sidney. Sozinha e desnorteada num país estranho, é feita refém num assalto a banco. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Russell Crowe, Youki Kudoh, Kenji Isomura, Ray Barrett, Robert Mammone, Petru Gheorghiu, Anthony Phelan, Matthew Dyktynski, Colin Hay, Susan Prior Diretor: Craig Lahiff

programme.title: Justiça Letal, (1969)
programme.desc: 1969. A equipe de Kane (Steven Seagal) enfrenta a “Nova Esperança” da Nação Ariana enquanto trabalha para influenciar o voto do público nas eleições municipais. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Risco Absoluto, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Liberado após seis anos preso por um crime que não cometeu, Shane Danielsnão demora a se meter novamente em encrenca. Ele testemunha um crime e para salvar uma jovem sequestrada se envolve com a máfia chinesa, russos e policiais corruptos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: Código de Honra, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Um ex-coronel das forças especiais se torna um vigilante que mata criminosos, enquanto um ex-colega quer detê-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, James Russo, Louis Mandylor, Craig Sheffer, Griff Furst, Helena Mattsson, Rafael Petardi, R.D. Call, Michael Flynn, Ileana Huxley Diretor: Michael Winnick

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: Ação Violenta, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. O Fantasma está fazendo compras e Kane sai para descobrir o que o aproxima do Fantasma. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Vidas Importam, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. As vidas dos policiais de Nova York colidem em histórias que se chocam em conflitos de raça, poder, derrotas e traição. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ice-T, Jules Willcox, Hassan Johnson, Robert Clohessy, Maurice Benard, Fredro Starr, Marc John Jefferies, Drew Allen, Victor Girone, Chris Kerson Diretor: Brendan Kyle Cochrane

programme.title: Guerra nas ruas, (1969)
programme.desc: 1969. O passado de Black Ops de Kane está causando incerteza no futuro da equipe SIU. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Redenção, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Jason Statham é um veterano de guerra que assume uma nova identidade enquanto tenta se vingar dos assassinos de sua namorada grávida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Agata Buzek, Jason Statham Diretor: Steven Knight

programme.title: O Anjo da Morte, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um policial disfarçado se aproxima de seu inimigo. Ela decide deixar um agente de confiança entrar em campo, mas tem dúvidas se ela tem o que é preciso para completar a missão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: No Vale das Sombras, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Um investigador militar aposentado trabalha com um detetive da polícia para descobrir a verdade por trás do desaparecimento do seu filho. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Tommy Lee Jones, Charlize Theron, Jason Patric, Susan Sarandon, James Franco, Barry Corbin, Josh Brolin, Frances Fisher, Wes Chatham, Jake McLaughlin Diretor: Paul Haggis

programme.title: B13-U 13º Distrito - Ultimato, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Damien e Leito estão retornando ao Distrito 13 em uma missão para levar a paz ao setor controlado por cinco líderes de gangues diferentes, antes que os serviços secretos da cidade tomem medidas drásticas para resolver o problema. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Cyril Raffaelli, David Belle, Philippe Torreton Diretor: Patrick Alessandrin

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Frank Martin é obrigado a conduzir Valentina, a filha de Leonid Vasilev, o chefe da Agência de Proteção Ambiental da Ucrânia, de Marselha a Odessa, além de dois sacos de conteúdo suspeito. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Robert Knepper, Natalya Rudakova, François Berléand, Jeroen Krabbé, Alex Kobold, David Atrakchi, Yann Sundberg, Eriq Ebouaney, David Kammenos Diretor: Olivier Megaton

programme.title: O Assassino, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um guarda-costas altamente qualificado, vingando a morte de seu irmão, descobre um círculo de corrupção que se estende aos mais altos níveis da sociedade e do governo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Vinnie Jones, Berik Aitzhanov, Sergey Nikonenko Diretor: Akan Satayev

programme.title: Punhos da Vingança, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Em Xangai, um ex-campeão de artes marciais mistas e herdeiro de uma corporação multibilionária, se junta a uma informante da polícia, para investigar a morte de seu irmão assassinado em um torneio de boxe underground Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steve Yoo, Wei Wang, Collin Chou, Kai Greene, Xiaoming Huang, Zhao Wei Diretor: Qing Guo

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Blitz é um serial killer de Londres que está matando policiais. O inspetor-chefe Roberts e o sargento Brant, um detetive de polícia duro, inflexível e politicamente incorreto, terão a tarefa de tentar deter o psicopata. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Paddy Considine, Aidan Gillen, David Riley Diretor: Elliott Lester, Jordan Hill

programme.title: Jogo Assassino, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. A polícia prende um psicopata que está ligado a vários sequestros e assassinatos de mulheres, mas sua captura será apenas o início de uma contagem regressiva em busca de suas vítimas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ben Kingsley, Stanley Tucci, Alexandra Daddario, Henry Cavill Diretor: David Raymond

programme.title: O Franco-Atirador, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Depois de uma longa carreira como matador de aluguel, Martin Terrier pretende se aposentar e passar o resto da vida ao lado de sua amada. programme.title: O Que Fazer?, (2014)

Agora Caleb terá o seu trabalho mais árduo, resgatar o coração de sua esposa. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Kirk Cameron, Erin Bethea Diretor: Alex Kendrick

programme.title: Max Steel, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Max é um adolescente de 16 anos que está passando por um período de descobertas. Entretanto, as transformações na vida do jovem estão relacionadas aos incríveis poderes que ele descobre ter quando entra em contato com uma força extraterrestre. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, junto com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestra BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Meu Trabalho É um Parto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Desesperada, Thea finge estar grávida para não perder o emprego. O único problema é que a gravidez é uma mentira e agora ela precisa fazer de tudo para convencer a todos de que realmente está esperando um bebê. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Trumbo - Lista Negra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Autor de algumas das histórias de maior sucesso da época, Dalton Trumbo foi preso e proibido de trabalhar. Mesmo quando saiu da prisão, demorou anos para vencer o boicote do governo, sofrendo com problemas envolvendo familiares e amigos próximos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: LBJ - A Esperança de uma Nação, (1970)

programme.title: The King's Avatar - Pela Glória, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma equipe de gamers é patrocinada para participar de sua primeira competição nacional de Glory. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais se tornam vítimas de uma gangue. Os policiais são brutalmente assassinados e um jovem é designado para ajudá-lo, mas a gangue volta a agir, iniciando uma aventura cheia de ação e vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Jovens e Rebeldes, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Como a maioria dos adolescentes, Culain, Enica, Julian e Sego devem lidar com pressões de outros jovens, bullying, problemas com os pais e, claro, amores não correspondidos. Mas eles também vivem sob o domínio opressivo do Império Romano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Everly - Implacável e Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma escrava sexual encarcerada por anos pelo chefe da máfia Yakuza enfrenta uma série de criminosos japoneses, a fim de proteger sua mãe e salvar sua filha, que não vê há anos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Era da Escuridão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Na década de 1920, durante a ocupação japonesa da Coreia e da China, guerreiros enfrentam policiais e agentes japoneses tentando contrabandear explosivos pela fronteira e utilizando meios violentos para alcançar os seus objetivos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: No Limite do Perigo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quatro jovens de Moscou viajam a Altai para fazer rafting em um rio. Após as coisas darem errado, eles pedem ajuda a um grupo que encontram no local. O que eles não sabiam era que os novos colegas são criminosos e acabam se tornando reféns. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um conto de fadas contemporâneo sobre o surgimento de uma amizade improvável entre uma jovem solitária que sonha ser autora de livros infantis e um viúvo rabugento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Catlow, (1971)
programme.desc: 1971. Cowan procura pelo seu amigo de infância Catlow, mas revela-se que Cowan é um oficial de polícia e a relação entre ambos não será nada fácil. Catlow é um ladrão, que junto com seus homens, reuniu gado sem marcar e planeja vendê-lo em Abilene. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Daliah Lavi, David Ladd, Jeff Corey, Julián Mateos, Leonard Nimoy, Michael Delano, Richard Crenna, Yul Brynner Diretor: Sam Wanamaker

programme.title: O Voo da Águia, (1979)
programme.desc: 1979. Pike, Martin Sheen, é um jovem forasteiro da cidade que se vê preso e perdido em meio ao deserto oeste selvagem quando o seu amigo e caçador de peles morre. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Claudio Brook, Harvey Keitel, John Castle, Jorge Luke, Jorge Russek, Martin Sheen, Sam Waterston, Stéphane Audran Diretor: Anthony Harvey

programme.title: O Dólar Furado, (1965)
programme.desc: 1965. Estados Unidos, segunda metade do século 19. Gary O'Hara é um ex-capitão do Exército dos Estados Confederados. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Franco Fantasia, Giuliano Gemma, Ida Galli, Ignazio Spalla, Nicholas St. John, Pierre Cressoy, Sal Borgese Diretor: Giorgio Ferroni

programme.title: Por uns Dólares a Mais, (1965)

Gêneros: Western Elenco: Aldo Sambrell, Clint Eastwood, Dante Maggio, Gian Maria Volonte, Klaus Kinski, Lee Van Cleef, Luigi Pistilli, Tomas Blanco. Diretor: Sergio Leone

programme.title: A Marca da Forca, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. Eles o cravaram de balas. Eles o penduraram pelo pescoço. Eles o deixaram para morrer. Mas eles cometeram dois erros fatais: eles tentaram enforcar o homem errado, e não terminaram o trabalho. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Ben Johnson, Bruce Dern, Charles Mcgraw, Clint Eastwood, Ed Begley, Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Ruth White Diretor: Ted Post

programme.title: Quando Explode a Vingança, (1971)
programme.desc: 1971. Juan Miranda é um camponês rude com coração de Robin Hood. Sean Mallory é um revolucionário irlandês que é especialista em dinamite e vive agora no México. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Antoine Saint John, Franco Graziosi, James Coburn, Maria Monti, Rik Battaglia, Rod Steiger, Romolo Valli, Vivienne Chandler Diretor: Sergio Leone

Gêneros: Western Elenco: Gianni Garko, William Berger, Sydney Chaplin, Gianni Rizzo, Fernando Sancho, Klaus Kinski, Andrea Scotti, Carlo Tamberlani, Franco Pesce, Heidi Fischer Diretor: Gianfranco Parolini

programme.title: Renegado impiedoso, (1972)
programme.desc: 1972. Pardon Chato é um índio Apache mestiço que vive na linha entre duas culturas, balanceando a sua tribo com o encantamento que tem pelo mundo dos brancos. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Charles Bronson, Jack Palance, James Whitmore, Ralph Waite, Richard Jordan, Simon Oakland, Victor French, William Watson Diretor: Michael Winner

programme.title: Rastros de Ódio, (1956)
programme.desc: 1956. O Veterano de Guerra Civil Ethan Edwards chega aos Texas em 1868 e encontra o seu irmão e a família dele. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Henry Brandon, Jeffrey Hunter, John Qualen, John Wayne, Natalie Wood, Olive Carey, Vera Miles, Ward Bond Diretor: John Ford

programme.title: Django, (1966)
programme.desc: 1966. Um pistoleiro carregando um caixão, entra em uma cidade que tem duas facções em guerra, o KKK e uma gangue de bandidos mexicanos. Esse é Django e ele se envolve em uma luta contra os dois lados. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Franco Nero, José Canalejas, José Bódalo Diretor: Sergio Corbucci

programme.title: Branded, (1950)
programme.desc: 1950. Choya, um pistoleiro de moral distorcida, é convencido por Leffingwell a se passar pelo filho do rancheiro Richard Lavery, que está desaparecido há vinte e cinco anos e, com isso, possa herdar a fortuna de sua família. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Alan Ladd, Charles Bickford, John Butler, Joseph Calleia, Mona Freeman, Peter Hansen, Robert Keith Diretor: Rudolph Maté

programme.title: Rumo ao Fim do Mundo, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Em meio a uma catástrofe biológica que ameaça destruir a raça humana, as histórias de três casais se cruzam quando eles são forçados a tomar decisões difíceis que definirão seu futuro. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Frank Langella, Gena Rowlands, Rosario Dawson, Alexis Bledel, Josh Hartnett, Penn Badgley, Teresa Palmer. Diretor: Brian Horiuchi

programme.title: Valan - Vale dos Anjos, (2019)

programme.title: O Assassino do Central Park, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Seis melhores amigos do ensino médio se reúnem para uma noite de diversão no Central Park. programme.desc: 2021. Um casal viaja para uma cabana isolada e descobrem a história aterrorizante do local. programme.title: Necrotério, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Uma brincadeira de estudantes universitários se torna mortal quando descobrem que um diretor de funerária pode ter sido libertado de um manicômio um pouco cedo demais. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Dan Byrd, Denise Crosby, Alexandra Adi Diretor: Tobe Hooper
